case_title: HUI QING OU VS. TONG LIU

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. FILED BY OU, HUI QING LIU, TONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OU, HUI QING AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, TONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OU, HUI QING AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, TONG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OU, HUI QING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, TONG $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,265.00, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY $1200.00 FOR PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL BILLS. PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY MEDICAL SERVICES BILL FROM SFSD OR REIMBURSE THE PARTY WHO HAS PAID THAT BILL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF OU, HUI QING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-13-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, TONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, TONG
